about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Assistant Manager · Operations Professional · MA Sociology
about.summary: I am an operations and retail management professional based in Berlin, currently working as Assistant Manager at InterSport Voswinkel GmbH. I hold a Master of Arts in Sociology (European Societies) from Freie Universität Berlin, which gives me a strong analytical foundation alongside my practical business experience.
about.academic: My background spans retail operations, inventory management, team leadership, and financial controlling. I have worked across Germany and Bangladesh in roles covering account management, production, and store operations — building a broad and adaptable professional skill set.
about.career: I am open to new opportunities in operations management, retail leadership, administration, or roles that combine analytical and interpersonal skills. I bring a detail-oriented, process-driven approach and thrive in multicultural, fast-paced environments.
about.values: I value efficiency, clear communication, and teamwork. I am proactive, self-reliant, and committed to continuous improvement — both in the processes I manage and in my own professional development.
